fields.description: When enabled, the weekly attendance summary email is sent automatically on the configured day and time.
fields.label: Enable Weekly Report

fields.description: Day of the week on which the weekly report email will be sent.
fields.label: Send On (Day of Week)
fields.options:
Monday
Tuesday
Wednesday
Thursday
Friday
Saturday
Sunday

fields.description: Time of day at which the weekly report will be triggered (matched to the hour by the hourly scheduler).
fields.label: Send Time

fields.description: When enabled, the monthly attendance summary email is sent automatically on the configured day and time.
fields.label: Enable Monthly Report

fields.description: Day of the month (1–28) on which the monthly report email will be sent. Values above 28 may not exist in every month.
fields.label: Send on Day of Month (1–28)

fields.description: Time of day at which the monthly report will be triggered (matched to the hour by the hourly scheduler).
fields.label: Send Time

fields.description: Shown above the issue tables when the employee has pending items. Use {count} as a placeholder for the number of issues. Leave blank to use the built-in default.
fields.label: Intro Text (Issues Found)

fields.description: Shown in the green banner when the employee has no pending attendance items. Leave blank to use the built-in default.
fields.label: No Issues Text

fields.description: Signature and closing text shown after the attendance tables. Use a blank line (press Enter twice) to separate paragraphs. Leave blank to use the built-in default.
fields.label: Email Signature

fields.description: Small disclaimer text shown in the email footer. Leave blank to use the built-in default.
fields.label: Footer Disclaimer
